summary.delivery_note: Telegram/Hermes delivery is not connected. This queue is app-only until Khalid explicitly approves the routing.
summary.data_note: Alert candidates are generated from the brain's emitted quote, disclosure, meeting and dividend data.

hermes.next: Use this JSON queue as the handoff source.

rules.label: Price move >= 2.0%
rules.description: Flags names with an absolute daily move of at least 2.0%.

rules.label: Disclosure materiality >= 85
rules.description: Flags the most material official/issuer disclosure flow.

rules.label: Ex-dividend within 45 days
rules.description: Flags upcoming ex-dividend dates for income tracking.

rules.label: Governance meeting within 21 days
rules.description: Flags near-term board/AGM/EGM events, especially dividend/capital topics.
